channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Thune: No Need for 'Weaponized' Intelligence Chief
item.description: The U.S. does not need a 'weaponized' director of national intelligence, Senate Majority Leader John Thune said Tuesday.

item.title: Fraudifornia Strikes Again: Federal Agents Arrest Man in Major Medi-Cal Fraud Case
David Axelrod Says Trump's Anger at Netanyahu Is Justified
item.description: Democratic strategist David Axelrod said President Donald Trump's reported frustration with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu was understandable.

item.title: Trump Ally Hinson Warns Iran Conflict Could Become GOP Liability
item.description: Representative Ashley Hinson, a leading Republican candidate for Iowa's open Senate seat, warned that the Iran conflict could become a political liability.
